description: 7 years ago today, Zelensky took office. His legacy is now tied to war Riding a wave of political momentum in 2019, Volodymyr Zelensky, a showman turned wartime leader, could have hardly imagined the path his presidency would take. Some argue that Zelensky's 2019 election was less of an endorsement of his political platform, a populist one, rather a rejection of the old entrenched elite seen as...

title: Drone strike near civilians
description: The forces of unmanned systems destroyed the training center for operators of "Akhmat" in occupied Snezhny. SBS said that the strike destroyed the training base for UAV pilots, the training complex and the deployment point of the special unit "North-Akhmat". The object was struck 11 times by drones with 100 kg warheads. UAVs and ammunition were collected in the complex, as well as personnel. The liquidation of 65...
description_en: The forces of unmanned systems destroyed the training center for operators of "Akhmat" in occupied Snezhny. SBS said that the strike destroyed the training base for UAV pilots, the training complex and the deployment point of the special unit "North-Akhmat". The object was struck 11 times by drones with 100 kg warheads. UAVs and ammunition were collected in the complex, as well as personnel. The liquidation of 65...
description_uk: Силы беспилотных систем разнесли центр подготовки операторов "Ахмата" в оккупированном Снежном В СБС заявили, что ударом уничтожены база подготовки пилотов БПЛА, учебный комплекс и пункт дислокации спецподразделения "Север-Ахмат". По объекту нанесли 11 ударов дронами с боевой частью по 100 кг. В комплексе собирали БПЛА и боеприпасы, а также размещался личный состав. Сообщается о ликвидации 65...

description: 🤬 The Russian Federation is actively expanding the Tsymbulova drone port for the launch of Geranium jets - monitoring channels Satellite images show the construction of ten more launchers for Geranium-5 UAVs, as well as new concrete shelters for the storage of strike drones. "Tsymbulova" is located in the Oryol region of the Russian Federation, not far from the village of the same name. The Russians are expanding this launch pad...

"Цимбулова" находится в Орловской области рф, недалеко от одноименного села. Россияне расширяют эту площадку под запуски...

description: He accepted credentials from the ambassadors of Panama, Mongolia and Peru. Every foreign policy direction is important for Ukraine, because in the end every country can contribute to the establishment of peace. We discussed bilateral relations between our states with the ambassadors. There is mutually beneficial potential in various areas, particularly in the economy. We are ready to meaningfully cooperate with everyone who respects peace, sovereignty and territorial...

Every foreign policy direction is important for Ukraine, because in the end every country can contribute to the establishment of peace. We discussed bilateral relations between our states with the ambassadors. There is mutually beneficial potential in various areas, particularly in the economy. We are ready to meaningfully cooperate with everyone who respects peace, sovereignty and territorial...
description_uk: Прийняв вірчі грамоти від послів Панами, Монголії та Перу. Кожен зовнішньополітичний напрямок для України важливий, бо зрештою кожна країна може посприяти встановленню миру. Обговорили з послами двосторонні відносини між нашими державами. Є взаємовигідний потенціал у різних сферах, зокрема в економіці. Ми готові змістовно співпрацювати з усіма, хто поважає мир, суверенітет і територіальну...

Завдання брічінгу - очистити шлях підрозділу і забезпечити темп виконання операції. Такі тренування формують впевнені дії і дозволяють швидко застосовувати відпрацьовані навички під час виконання бойових завдань. Приєднуйся та тренуйся! +38(093)888-17-88...

title: Attack attack
description: Russian oil had a hot night: the defense forces attacked the Lukoil-Nizhegorodorgsintez refinery and the Yaroslavl-3 station. At the Kstovo refinery, the AVT-6 primary oil processing unit was hit, and a fire started. Four tanks with a total volume of 140,000 cubic meters were damaged at the Yaroslavl-3 oil pumping station. In addition, the Ukrainian military defeated control points, centers...

description_uk: У российской нефти выдались горячие ночи: Силы обороны ударили по НПЗ «Лукойл-Нижегородоргсинтез» и станции «Ярославль-3» На НПЗ в Кстово была поражена установка первичной переработки нефти АВТ-6, после чего начался пожар. На нефтеперекачивающей станции «Ярославль-3» повреждены четыре резервуара общим объемом 140 тысяч кубометров. Кроме того, украинские военные поразили пункты управления, центры...

title: 60 missiles intercepted
description: Russians began equipping "Shakhedy" with missiles with elements made of depleted uranium. The SBU reports that an elevated radiation background was found on the wreckage of a drone shot down in the Chernihiv region in April. We are talking about the R-60 missile, which the Katsaps install on the modified "Gerany-2" to destroy Ukrainian planes and helicopters. A gamma radiation level of 12 μSv/h was recorded near the wreckage — this is...
description_en: Russians began equipping "Shakhedy" with missiles with elements made of depleted uranium. A gamma radiation level of 12 μSv/h was recorded near the wreckage — this is...
description_uk: россияне начали оснащать «Шахеды» ракетами с элементами из обедненного урана СБУ сообщает, что на обломках дрона, сбитого в Черниговской области в апреле, обнаружили повышенный радиационный фон. Речь идет о ракете Р-60, которую кацапы устанавливают на модифицированные «Герани-2» для поражения украинских самолетов и вертолетов. description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 131 ВОРОЖИЙ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 20 травня (з 18:00 19 травня) противник атакував балістичною ракетою Іскандер-М із Ростовської обл. -рф, 154 ударними БпЛА типу Shahed (в т.ч. реактивними), Гербера, Італмас та дронами-імітаторами типу «Пародія» із напрямків: Курськ, Шаталово, Орел, Брянськ, Міллєрово, Приморсько-Ахтарськ – рф. Повітряний напад відбивали авіація, зенітні...

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Ukraine reportedly strikes Russian chemical plant for second time in a week. Ukraine's military reportedly struck the Nevinnomyssk Azot plant in Russia's southern Stavropol Krai overnight on May 20, Russian Telegram media channels reported.
description_en: Ukraine reportedly strikes Russian chemical plant for second time in a week. Ukraine's military reportedly struck the Nevinnomyssk Azot plant in Russia's southern Stavropol Krai overnight on May 20, Russian Telegram media channels reported.
description_uk: Ukraine reportedly strikes Russian chemical plant for second time in a week. Ukraine's military reportedly struck the Nevinnomyssk Azot plant in Russia's southern Stavropol Krai overnight on May 20, Russian Telegram media channels reported.

title: Kyiv: Attack attack on residential area
title_en: Kyiv: Attack attack on residential area
description: Russia strikes residential buildings, businesses in multiple regions of Ukraine, injuring at least 11. Russia launched attacks on several Ukrainian regions overnight on May 20, striking multi-story residential buildings, businesses, and other civilian targets, while injuring at least 11 people, officials reported.
description_en: Russia strikes residential buildings, businesses in multiple regions of Ukraine, injuring at least 11. Russia launched attacks on several Ukrainian regions overnight on May 20, striking multi-story residential buildings, businesses, and other civilian targets, while injuring at least 11 people, officials reported.
